scope: Release hardening policy for Windows installer signing, Microsoft Store MSIX/AppX distribution, updater, release channels, and sidecar bundle gates.

installer_status.public_distribution_target: Future Microsoft Store-compatible MSIX/AppX path, deferred until Store packaging and certification are validated.
installer_status.fresh_installer_qa_reason: No installer, Store/MSIX package, updater, or sidecar packaging code changed in this issue; this evidence records the release gate that must be satisfied before public distribution.

code_signing.decision: Do not buy a paid direct-distribution Windows code-signing certificate now; future public Windows distribution targets Microsoft Store-compatible MSIX/AppX packaging and Store signing after successful Store processing.
code_signing.direct_distribution_policy: Do not publish unsigned NSIS/MSI/EXE installers as public GitHub Release downloads.
code_signing.secret_policy: Never commit private keys, PFX files, certificate passwords, vault credentials, signing service tokens, Partner Center credentials, or signing logs containing secrets.

updater.decision: Do not enable the Tauri updater for Store/public distribution unless a later trusted-channel design explicitly requires and verifies it. Future Store channel updates are expected to be Store-managed.
updater.development_channel_policy: dev builds remain manual/local-only and do not auto-update.
updater.alpha_channel_policy: GitHub alpha milestones may contain source/release notes and safe verification metadata, but must not publish unsigned installable Windows binaries.

sidecar_bundle_assumptions.runtime_boundary: The sidecar must bind to 127.0.0.1 and must not expose hosted AI credentials through React or Rust.
sidecar_bundle_assumptions.model_bundle_boundary: No Gemma, Qwen, PaddleOCR, Qwen-VL, or faster-whisper models are bundled by this installer.

public_release_blockers: No Store-compatible MSIX/AppX packaging path validated
No Microsoft Store identity, submission, or certification evidence
No public-release evidence for sidecar process-tree cleanup in the intended distribution path
